esearchresult.querytranslation: (microsimulation[Title/Abstract]) AND ("Communicable Diseases"[Mesh] OR infection*[Title/Abstract] OR infectious[Title/Abstract] OR outbreak*[Title/Abstract] OR epidemic*[Title/Abstract] OR pathogen*[Title/Abstract] OR vaccin*[Title/Abstract] OR antimicrobial resistance[Title/Abstract]) AND ("2010/01/01"[Date - Publication] : "2026/12/31"[Date - Publication])
